docs.text: Phil's Pages ¶ Overview ¶ Here I hope to dazzle and amaze you with things I know. Spelling not one of them.
docs.title: Phil's Pages

docs.title: Overview

docs.text: BuildBot ¶ buildbot is a wonderful CI/CD Framework that can be customized and built upon to make a CI/CD Platform that uses Docker, Virtual Compute Instances, or local workers. Here I'll attempt to provide some information I have learned while using BuildBot to help others make their journeys a lot more smooth. References ¶ BuildBot Homepage
docs.title: BuildBot
